prompt: Run a real, cheap Modal GPU fine-tuning smoke test that follows the modal-finetuning skill's LLM guidance: use a small public instruct model, a tiny dataset, Volume-backed model/checkpoint storage, and save at least one post-training sample artifact.
assertions: The run uses a single Modal GPU and completes a real training loop
The run persists checkpoints or final adapters in a Modal Volume
The run saves a sample output artifact after training
The workflow stays in training scope rather than turning into serving guidance
